name: instagram-auto-publisher
description: Reusable Instagram automation templates and workflow guidance for carousel/feed publishing.

interface.longDescription: Build, adapt, validate, preview, and publish automated Instagram carousel/feed workflows with configurable accounts, content packs, visual styles, GitHub Actions, dry-run support, and PT-BR copy validation.
defaultPrompt: Create Instagram automation for a new account.
Adapt this feed publisher to another Instagram.
Validate and preview my Instagram carousel workflow.
